title: Bonney Sees Kuma’s Memories
description: On pages 11–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Ivankov, Marines, Kuzan, King Bekori, Unknown person #11 as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
scene: Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We're still lacking funds.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For now we must act like mercenaries! Supporting those who already have a will to topic their monarchs. Fuelling their rebellious spirits!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All our recruits get weapons training drilled into them...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want us to grow into a boundless army. Spread throughout the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: Where did you learn about weapons, Dragon-San?

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: I spent some time with the navy...

dialogue.speaker: Kuzan
dialogue.text: Unfortunately, I found no justice there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Marine or Revolution- nary...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He's a man determined to help others!!

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: You can rely on me, Dragon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You won't regret joining us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Well, I'll be! Look who's back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll be coming home every now and then. I worry about you all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You're so sweet, Kumachi!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And thus, another 8 years would pass, the sun would continue to rise and set like normal, until...

dialogue.speaker: King Bekori
dialogue.text: 14 YEARS AGO, A CERTAIN KINGDOM

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hm? It's that obvious?

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: You look excited, Ginny-san!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: CAN YOU BLAME ME THOUGH?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're so close to the day where we get to link up with Kumachi's squadron!!

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: I'm so happy, I can hardly breathe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: captain of the revolutionary army's eastern forces GINNY

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Captain Kuma... that lucky dog!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's won the heart of the lady we all admire!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: HUM?! You creeps admire me?! Gross!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Your words sting-!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: REVOLUTIONARY HEADQUARTERS - BALTIGO

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: Dragon-San!! Dragon-San!!

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: Ginny's been captured?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The enemy took us by surprise... Please forgive us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Disturbing News....!!

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney’s Tragedy through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
